prompt:
Game: Light Warrior.
Asset ID: environment.thunder_hammer_temple.
Thunder Hammer temple landmark reference for a UE5 third-person arena game. Tartaria-inspired and Egyptian-resonance sacred technology node, pale stone, gold inlays, dawn-blue lightning core, etheric resonance arches, pedestal outside the starting safety circle, huge flat-world horizon so the end cannot be seen. Include front view, side view, top-down footprint, material detail, and gameplay camera thumbnail.
Global style rules: No text, logo, watermark, UI labels, or decorative frame inside generated images. Prioritize UE5 third-person gameplay readability over decorative micro-detail. Use the game world's reality: luminous guardian power, living darkness, sacred technology, resonance, etheric force, Tartaria-inspired restored architecture, and flat huge-world horizon logic. Hero reads as white-gold and dawn-blue. Enemies read as violet-black with red-violet danger tells. Restoration reads as warm gold and dawn-blue. Every output is a candidate until proven in a UE5 gameplay capture.
Avoid: text, letters, logo, watermark, generic medieval church, dark blurry temple, cluttered stairs, unsafe collision shapes, photorealistic noise.
review_gate: Temple must be the strongest landmark and support clean navigation/collision.
